context.projectOverview: agent-bober medical team, branch bober/medical-team. Sprint 2 establishes authenticated, egress-gated WHOOP access WITHOUT persistence (Sprint 3 does sync/CLI). Add a third 'device-connection' EgressAxis (default false, independent of the existing two), WhoopTokenStore (env creds + 0600 sidecar), and WhoopClient (OAuth2 refresh, v2 paginated fetch, 401/429 handling) confined to ONE new ESLint-excepted network file.

completedSprints.title: Code-enforced non-emergency refusal layer
completedSprints.summary: Commit 2a8ff70. RefusalDetector + guardrails refuse verdict + engine refuse-dispatch. Did NOT touch egress.ts or schema.ts.

completedSprints.title: Base medical team
completedSprints.summary: EgressGuard exists in src/medical/egress.ts with TWO axes (cloud-inference + literature-retrieval, both default false), isAllowed/assertAllowed switch + never-guard, fromConfig reading MedicalSectionSchema. src/medical/retrieval/medline-source.ts is the EXISTING ESLint-excepted network file (the template: FetchLike injectable transport, module-const base URL, assertAllowed-before-fetch, fixture-driven tests). src/medical/audit.ts has the 0600 write + ensureDir + .bober/medical path pattern. src/providers/factory.ts:96-136 reads process.env credentials. eslint.config.js has the scoped src/medical/** network boundary with a single exception (medline-source.ts).
